T0067.title: Broad-Sweep Data
T0067.definition: In illicit data trading, broad but non-specific personal or organizational data. This type of data has usually not undergone fine screening or verification, may contain a large amount of useless information, and has low accuracy and validity. Consequently, its value on underground markets is typically low.
